improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your operations. Try three free searches today.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your Business & Trade Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="AI-powered assistance for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
<meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Meet Gideon, Your Business & Trade Assistant">
<meta name="twitter:description" content="AI-powered assistance for business owners, traders, and professionals. Try three free searches today.">
improvements.rationale: A clear meta description improves click-through rates from search results by communicating the core value proposition and free trial offer. Open Graph and Twitter Card tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, or Twitter—critical for B2B audiences. The copy stays factual, highlights key benefits (instant answers, voice chat, free searches), and avoids invented claims.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a professional workspace built for business owners and traders. Try three searches free, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately establishes what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it serves (trade/business professionals). The subheading highlights three key value props while clearly communicating the free trial offer, reducing friction for first-time visitors and setting clear expectations before the paywall.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to join as a member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day (billed monthly), giving you unlimited access to Gideon's full capabilities—including voice chat, your personal workspace, and professional trade and business support. Choose annual billing and save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the user journey—the transition from free trial to paid membership. It reinforces value (unlimited access, voice chat, workspace) and highlights the annual savings incentive, helping convert curious visitors into paying members.
